items.line_en: Hey Veronica, I know you're on your lunch break, so it's just a quick question.

coach.say: Hey Veronica, I know you're on your lunch break, so it's just a quick question.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey Veronica, / I know you're on your lunch break, / so it's just a quick question.

items.line_en: Did you send out the confirmation for the meet up on Saturday?

coach.say: Did you send out the confirmation for the meet up on Saturday?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Did you send out the confirmation for the meet up on Saturday?

items.line_en: Yeah, I did send it and I see see you on it.

coach.say: Yeah, I did send it and I see see you on it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yeah, / I did send it and I see see you on it.

items.line_en: Veronica, I'm so sorry to bother you again on your lunch break.

coach.say: Veronica, I'm so sorry to bother you again on your lunch break.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Veronica, / I'm so sorry to bother you again on your lunch break.

items.line_en: Do you know, I didn't receive the email for the event location, just confirming everything.

coach.say: Do you know, I didn't receive the email for the event location, just confirming everything.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you know, / I didn't receive the email for the event location, / just confirming everything.

items.line_en: Do you think that you can take a look at that for me?

coach.say: Do you think that you can take a look at that for me?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you think that you can take a look at that for me?

items.line_en: Check your spam folder, otherwise, when I'm done with my lunch break, I'm happy to

coach.say: Check your spam folder, otherwise, when I'm done with my lunch break, I'm happy to
coach.hint: Chunk it: Check your spam folder, / otherwise, / when I'm done with my lunch break, / I'm happy to
Chunk it: resend it to you.

items.line_en: Veronica, are you still on your lunch break?

coach.say: Veronica, are you still on your lunch break?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Veronica, / are you still on your lunch break?
Chunk it: Yes, / I'm still on lunch.

items.line_en: I've been interrupted five times during my uninterrupted hour long lunch, so for every

coach.say: I've been interrupted five times during my uninterrupted hour long lunch, so for every
coach.hint: Chunk it: I've been interrupted five times during my uninterrupted hour long lunch, / so for every

items.line_en: five minutes that I'm interrupted, I'm just adding those five minutes to the end of my lunch

coach.say: five minutes that I'm interrupted, I'm just adding those five minutes to the end of my lunch
coach.hint: Chunk it: five minutes that I'm interrupted, / I'm just adding those five minutes to the end of my lunch

items.line_en: So, I mean, we can keep chatting if you'd like, but I have about another half hour,

coach.say: So, I mean, we can keep chatting if you'd like, but I have about another half hour,
coach.hint: Chunk it: So, / I mean, / we can keep chatting if you'd like, / but I have about another half hour,

items.line_en: left on my lunch break from how many times I've been interrupted today.

coach.say: left on my lunch break from how many times I've been interrupted today.
coach.hint: Chunk it: left on my lunch break from how many times I've been interrupted today.
